title: An Act to Modify Provisions of Law Affecting Small Distilleries
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 5, 2026
last_house_action: 1/13/2026 - Committee on Veterans and Legal Affairs suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/5/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
